name: popover
description: Floating content anchored to a trigger element. Non-modal by default — clicks outside dismiss it. Use for inline forms, info, or quick actions.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback on open state change: (open: boolean) => void

props.name: modal
props.description: When true, content outside the popover is inert

examples.title: Basic popover
examples.description: Quick settings anchored to a button
examples.code:
Dimensions

Set the dimensions for the layer.

ai.whenToUse: Use for inline forms, quick settings, info panels, or color pickers. Anchored to a trigger, non-modal, dismisses on outside click.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for critical tasks that interrupt (use Dialog). Don't use for hover-only info (use Tooltip or HoverCard). Don't use for menu actions (use DropdownMenu).
commonMistakes: Using Popover when the user must address the content (should be Dialog)
Missing asChild on PopoverTrigger when using a styled Button
Popover content too wide — keep it focused and compact
ai.accessibilityNotes: Radix manages focus, aria-expanded on the trigger, and closes on Escape. Content is portalled to body so stacking contexts don't clip it.
